title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 11 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 11 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 11 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/11/2025
DCE iron ore futures fluctuated rangebound today. The most-traded contract I2601 closed at 763 yuan/mt,up 0.2% from the previous trading day. Spot cargo prices at ports were basically flat compared to the previous trading day, with PB fines transaction prices in Shandong at 768-775 yuan/mt, basically unchanged from yesterday, and those in Hebei at 780-785 yuan/mt, flat from yesterday.
